notes: Selected after local probing because it exposes machine-readable JSON events with session IDs and token counts.
The local crush install advertised --yolo in help output but rejected the flag at runtime, which makes it a poor default for unattended benchmarking here.
The explicit build agent has permissive filesystem/tool rules, which is the closest match to the requested autonomous coding workflow.

models.label: Gemma 4 31B
models.selection_reason: Hosted locally and is the largest Gemma 4 variant exposed by opencode. Skipped by default until the provider load issue is resolved.

models.label: GLM 4.7 Flash BF16
models.selection_reason: Added back as a local benchmark target after increasing server swap. Skipped by default because observed throughput is too low to be practical on current hardware.

models.label: Llama 4 Scout
models.selection_reason: Requested local model family; exact hosted variant available through opencode. Skipped by default because Ollama unloads or goes idle before the benchmark run can begin reliably.

models.label: Qwen 3 32B
models.selection_reason: Requested local model family; exact hosted variant available through opencode. Superseded by the Qwen 3.5 line for future local benchmarking. Skipped by default after benchmark preview averaged 7.96 output tok/s over the first 3 steps (< 20.00).

models.label: Qwen 3 Coder Next
models.selection_reason: Best direct coding-oriented local Qwen variant matching the original benchmark brief, but now superseded by the Qwen 3.5 Coder variants for future local benchmarking. Skipped by default after benchmark preview measured 6.59 output tok/s (< 20.00).

models.label: Qwen 3.5 35B
models.selection_reason: Requested local model family; exact hosted variant available through opencode.

models.label: Qwen 3.5 122B
models.selection_reason: Largest requested local Qwen 3.5 variant hosted on the Ollama server.

models.label: Qwen 3.5 Coder 35B
models.selection_reason: Community-packaged coding-optimized Qwen 3.5 35B variant to compare against the base Qwen 3.5 local model.

models.label: Qwen 3.5 Coder 122B
models.selection_reason: Largest community-packaged coding-optimized Qwen 3.5 variant for comparison against the base 122B local model.

models.label: GPT OSS 20B
models.selection_reason: Added as a local Ollama GPT OSS baseline for later warmup and benchmark testing.

models.label: Nemotron Cascade 2
models.selection_reason: Added as a local Ollama Nemotron Cascade 2 candidate for later warmup and benchmark testing. This entry uses explicit local model metadata because it is not yet mapped in the home opencode config.

models.label: GPT 5.4 Pro
models.selection_reason: Chosen from the OpenRouter GPT 5.4 family as the largest and most coding-oriented variant.

models.label: Kimi K2.5
models.selection_reason: Chosen as the latest/highest Kimi variant listed by OpenRouter locally.

models.label: GLM 5
models.selection_reason: Chosen as the latest/highest GLM variant listed by OpenRouter locally; this replaces the local GLM test.

models.label: Qwen 3.6 Plus
models.selection_reason: Added from OpenRouter cloud availability; chose the non-preview Qwen 3.6 Plus variant exposed locally.

models.label: MiniMax M2.7
models.selection_reason: Chosen as the largest/latest MiniMax variant listed by OpenRouter locally.
